Prayer Times & Religious Activities

Use this panel to update everything users see under Prayer Times, Jumu'ah Reminders, Ramadan Schedule, and Islamic Lectures.

These three sections below control the Jumu'ah, Ramadan, and Islamic Lecture tabs that users see.
